languages.text: Нечто сбило шаттл Лорда-капитана. Судно совершило аварийную посадку неподалеку от зарегистрированного авгурами человеческого поселения. Возможно, там получится отыскать способы связаться с кораблем.
Something downed the Lord Captain's shuttle. The vessel crash-landed near a human settlement detected by the augurs. It may be possible to find some means of contacting the flagship there.
languages.original_text: Нечто сбило шаттл Лорда-капитана. Судно совершило аварийную посадку неподалеку от зарегистрированного авгурами человеческого поселения. Возможно, там получится отыскать способы связаться с кораблем.

traits.locale_text: Something downed the Lord Captain's shuttle. The vessel crash-landed near a human settlement detected by the augurs. It may be possible to find some means of contacting the flagship there.

Something downed {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s shuttle. The vessel crash-landed near a human settlement detected by the augurs. It may be possible to find some means of contacting the flagship there.

Something downed {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s shuttle. The vessel crash-landed near a human settlement detected by the augurs. It may be possible to find some means of contacting the flagship there.
Something downed the Lord Captain's shuttle. The vessel crash-landed near a human settlement detected by the augurs. It may be possible to find some means of contacting the flagship there.

languages.text: {mf|卿|卿女}のシャトルが撃墜された。その船は、アウグスによって発見された人間の居住区の近くで墜落した。旗艦と連絡を取る手段が見つかるかもしれない。
languages.original_text: Something downed {mf|His Lordship|Her Ladyship}'s shuttle. The vessel crash-landed near a human settlement detected by the augurs. It may be possible to find some means of contacting the flagship there.

traits.locale_text: {mf|卿|卿女}のシャトルが撃墜された。その船は、アウグスによって発見された人間の居住区の近くで墜落した。旗艦と連絡を取る手段が見つかるかもしれない。

languages.text: Algo ha derribado la lanzadera de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán. La nave se ha estrellado cerca de un asentamiento humano detectado por los augures. Tal vez haya alguna forma de contactar con la nave insignia allí.
languages.original_text: Something downed the Lord Captain's shuttle. The vessel crash-landed near a human settlement detected by the augurs. It may be possible to find some means of contacting the flagship there.

traits.locale_text: Algo ha derribado la lanzadera de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán. La nave se ha estrellado cerca de un asentamiento humano detectado por los augures. Tal vez haya alguna forma de contactar con la nave insignia allí.

languages.text: Etwas brachte das Shuttle des Lord Captains zum Absturz. Das Schiff stürzte unweit einer von den Auguren entdeckten menschlichen Ansiedlung ab. Vielleicht gibt es dort eine Möglichkeit, das Flaggschiff zu kontaktieren.
languages.original_text: Something downed the Lord Captain's shuttle. The vessel crash-landed near a human settlement detected by the augurs. It may be possible to find some means of contacting the flagship there.

traits.locale_text: Etwas brachte das Shuttle des Lord Captains zum Absturz. Das Schiff stürzte unweit einer von den Auguren entdeckten menschlichen Ansiedlung ab. Vielleicht gibt es dort eine Möglichkeit, das Flaggschiff zu kontaktieren.

languages.text: Quelque chose a provoqué le crash de la navette {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine}. Le vaisseau s'est écrasé à proximité d'une colonie humaine détectée par les augures. Il sera peut-être possible d'y trouver un moyen de contacter le vaisseau amiral.
languages.original_text: Something downed the Lord Captain's shuttle. The vessel crash-landed near a human settlement detected by the augurs. It may be possible to find some means of contacting the flagship there.

traits.locale_text: Quelque chose a provoqué le crash de la navette {mf|du seigneur-capitaine|de la seigneure-capitaine}. Le vaisseau s'est écrasé à proximité d'une colonie humaine détectée par les augures. Il sera peut-être possible d'y trouver un moyen de contacter le vaisseau amiral.

languages.text: 某种存在击落了舰长大人的穿梭机。舰船迫降在俄歇矩阵侦测到的一处人类定居点附近。或许能在那里找到与旗舰取得联系的方法。
languages.original_text: Something downed the Lord Captain's shuttle. The vessel crash-landed near a human settlement detected by the augurs. It may be possible to find some means of contacting the flagship there.

traits.locale_text: 某种存在击落了舰长大人的穿梭机。舰船迫降在俄歇矩阵侦测到的一处人类定居点附近。或许能在那里找到与旗舰取得联系的方法。

languages.text: Bir şey, Lord Kaptan'ın mekiğini düşürdü. Gemi, alametlerin tespit ettiği bir insan yerleşiminin yakınına zorunlu iniş yaptı. Orada sancak gemisiyle iletişim kurmanın bir yolunu bulmak mümkün olabilir.
languages.original_text: Something downed the Lord Captain's shuttle. The vessel crash-landed near a human settlement detected by the augurs. It may be possible to find some means of contacting the flagship there.

traits.locale_text: Bir şey, Lord Kaptan'ın mekiğini düşürdü. Gemi, alametlerin tespit ettiği bir insan yerleşiminin yakınına zorunlu iniş yaptı. Orada sancak gemisiyle iletişim kurmanın bir yolunu bulmak mümkün olabilir.
